debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

proof:
by
  constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hoto, honto⟩
    choose g hg using honto
    exact ⟨f, g, funext hg, funext (fun u => hoto (g (f u)) u (hg (f u)))⟩
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro u1 u2 h
      calc u1 = g (f u1) := (congrFun hgf u1).symm
           _ = g (f u2) := congrArg g h
           _ = u2 := congrFun hgf u2
    · intro v
      exact ⟨g v, congrFun hfg v⟩
